question: Should the manuscript make regime-qualified claims on canonical matched surface?
core_finding: strict_f3 exceeds the strongest available external comparator mean accuracy in all 9 dataset×budget regimes on this canonical matched surface.
qualification: Seed-level deltas are not uniformly positive inside every regime, so claims should be phrased as regime-mean dominance on this surface, not per-seed universal dominance.
paper_recommendation: Use regime-qualified statements (dataset×budget means) in manuscript-facing text and explicitly note seed-level variability.
